channel.title: Saer Zulkarnain
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Saer Zulkarnain

item.title: Past practice shows the prime minister meets with the representatives of trade b...
item.description: Past practice shows the prime minister meets with the representatives of trade bodies within a couple of weeks of swearing in, as you need the business community on your side to keep the wheels of the economy rolling. But not Tarique Rahman. This morning, after one-and-a-half months into office, he finally held court with businesspeople — but it couldn’t be more insulting to the community at large. He met with select individuals, rather than trade bodies that represent the industries, who can convey the practical challenges and issues they are facing. On what basis were these individuals chosen? And why is a notorious Awami League financier Ziaur Rahman, managing director of Bay Footwear, in this group? He funded destabilising activities by the Awami League activists during the interim government’s period. Since Syed Nasim Manzur, the president of Leathergoods And Footwear Manufacturers & Exporters Association of Bangladesh (LFMEAB), is in this group, what was the logic of adding the Bay Footwear MD in this group when he doesn’t hold any position on the LFMEAB board? Why is Syed Mohammad Tanvir, who was in the Awami League sub-committee on industry and commerce for 2023-2025, in this select group of people afforded the PM's audience? Is Tarique Rahman signalling that this group of businesspeople would be the new oligarchs under the BNP government? I am going to give him the benefit of doubt for this as this shortlist was made by BIDA, so it is Ashik Chowdhury and his right-hand Nahian Rahman Rochi who should be blamed for this f*ck-up. This is expected when you thrust a mid-ranking banker into a consequential position purely on personal connections (Grameen Board adviser). But when an elected government that promised meritocracy retains him when they have a buffet of more qualified and proven candidates, there really is concern for the ruling party from within — are they heading for a crash landing? This phoney must have some top-grade Kompromat to continue to be on solid footing without any result to show for all his showmanship, hype and publicity blitz. In his watch, Bangladesh’s investment pipeline has shrunk by 60 percent in 2025. What is worse is that he is willing to cut treasonous and anti-national deals to show some result against his name, as the recent deal with China’s Handa Industries indicates.

item.title: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাব...
item.description: আল জাজিরার ইনভেস্টিগেটিভ ইউনিট (আই-ইউনিট)-এর অনুসন্ধানে উঠে এসেছে বাংলাদেশের সাবেক প্রধানমন্ত্রী শেখ হাসিনা কর্তৃক, ২০২৪ এর রক্তাক্ত ছাত্র আন্দোলন দমনের লক্ষ্যে নির্দয় গোপন নির্দেশাবলির বিস্তারিত। #হাসিনা৩৬জুলাই
